## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest -q` passed
- [ ] If benchmark logic changed, strict validation run completed
- [ ] If claims changed, report artifacts were updated

## Reproducibility Notes

List seeds/env vars/commands used for any new performance or ablation claims.

## Scope Check

- [ ] Claims remain within software/simulation scope
- [ ] No unverifiable claim language introduced
